---
title: "analysis_2021"
author: "Jennah Gosciak"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) { 
  rmarkdown::render(inputFile,
  encoding=encoding,
  output_file="analysis_2021.html")})
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    theme: paper
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, message = F, warning = F,
  fig.width = 6, fig.height = 10
)
```

```{r, setup, include = F}
# Setup
library(renv)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(magrittr)
library(eeptools)
library(assertr)
library(readr)
library(openxlsx)
library(DBI)
library(dplyr)
library(dbplyr)
library(RPostgres)
library(lubridate)
library(fs)
library(sf)
library(vroom)
library(leaflet)
library(viridis)
library(ggmap)
library(basemaps)
library(rgdal)

# DB Connection
con <- dbConnect(Postgres(),
  user = "furmandata",
  password = rstudioapi::askForPassword(),
  host = "fcdata.c7h93yqbqnvu.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com",
  port = 5432,
  dbname = "fcdata",
  bigint = "integer"
)

source("99_common.R")
out <- "03_Output"
inp <- "01_Input"
figs <- path(out, "figs")

colors <- c("#512e92","#e03616","#758ecd", "#FFC857","#0b5351")
```

# Load 2021 PLUTO data filtered for NYU
```{r} 
ny21 <- st_read(path(out, "nyu_21.geojson")) %>% 
  mutate(borough = if_else(borough == "Citywide", 
                           "Citywide", 
                           boros[match(borough, abbs)]),
         borough = factor(borough, levels = c(boros, "Citywide"),
                          ordered = T))
ny21

ny21 %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  tablist_qc(ownername)

# total assessed value
assess_value_tbl <- ny21 %>% 
  summarize(total_assessed = sum(assesstot, na.rm = T),
                total_assessed_str = 
                          formatC(total_assessed,
                                     digits = 10,
                                     big.mark = ",")) %>%
  mutate(borough = "Citywide") %>% 
  bind_rows(ny21 %>% 
              group_by(borough) %>% 
              summarize(total_assessed = sum(assesstot, na.rm = T),
                total_assessed_str = 
                          formatC(total_assessed,
                                     digits = 10,
                                     big.mark = ","))) 

assess_value_tbl

assess_value_tbl %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(borough, total_assessed)) +
  geom_col(fill = colors[1]) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5000000000),
                     breaks = c(0, 1000000000, 2000000000,
                                3000000000, 4000000000,
                                5000000000),
                     labels = str_c("$", 
                                    formatC(c(0, 
                                              1000000000, 
                                              2000000000,
                                3000000000, 4000000000,
                                5000000000), digits = 10,
                                big.mark = ","))) +
  labs(y = "Total assessed value",
       x = "") +
  theme_classic()

ggsave(path(figs, "total_assessed.pdf"))
```

```{r, plot each borough}
ny21_filt <- ny21 %>% 
  filter(borough == "Manhattan") %>% 
  st_as_sf("geom_poly") %>% 
  st_transform(4326)

ext <- st_bbox(ny21_filt)
basemap_magick(ext, map_service = "carto", map_type = "dark")


ggplot() +
  basemap_ggplot(ext) +
  geom_sf(data =  ny21_filt, fill = colors[2], color = NA) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.line=element_blank(),axis.text.x=element_blank(),
          axis.text.y=element_blank(),axis.ticks=element_blank(),
          axis.title.x=element_blank(),
          axis.title.y=element_blank(),legend.position="none")
```
